researched_category.notes: LiveAgent is an all-in-one customer service platform with live chat, ticketing, call center, knowledge base, and AI chatbot.

one_liner.value: Web-based help desk software with live chat, ticketing, call center, and AI-powered customer support automation.
one_liner.notes: From the homepage and feature descriptions.

methods.notes: Primary auth is API key passed in the 'apikey' HTTP header. The API key documentation shows cURL examples using header-based auth. The Python client also mentions OAuth2 (privileges) but API key is the primary documented method for programmatic use.

access.notes: LiveAgent offers a 30-day free trial with no credit card required. API keys are generated within the admin panel (Configuration > System > API), so you must be logged in as an admin of a LiveAgent account. The number of API keys depends on your plan: Small (1), Medium (5), Large (10), Enterprise (100). The free trial includes API access. There is no phone verification or company email gate, though they 'encourage' company email.

summary.value: LiveAgent has two documented REST API versions (v1 and v3) with a broad set of endpoints covering tickets, conversations, contacts, agents, companies, knowledge base, files, reports, departments, tags, calls, and more. API v3 includes an OpenAPI/Swagger descriptor. Rate limit is 180 requests per minute per API key on cloud accounts. The API is documented on the LiveAgent support site.

agent_interface.notes: LiveAgent has a built-in MCP (Model Context Protocol) server as of version 5.63 (May 2026), allowing connection with external AI tools like Claude Desktop, Cursor, claude.ai, and FlowHunt. There is also a community-maintained Python SDK (QualityUnit/LiveAgent-api-python) auto-generated from the Swagger spec. No specific Composio toolkit was found for LiveAgent.

rationale.value: LiveAgent has a well-documented, broad REST API (v1 and v3) with API key authentication, self-serve signup with a free trial, and even a built-in MCP server. A developer can sign up for a free trial, generate API keys from the admin panel, and immediately begin building agent integrations. The only minor friction is needing admin-level access to generate API keys, which is standard for help desk platforms.

s1.quote: LiveAgent combines an all-in-one customer service platform with AI chatbot, live chat, ticketing, and call center.
s1.title: LiveAgent - Help Desk Software & Live Chat

s2.quote: LiveAgent's API enables seamless software communication, supporting actions like company retrieval and conversation creation.
s2.title: API features | LiveAgent

s3.quote: Your API key has to be set in header of your requests: curl --location --request GET 'https://your.ladesk.com/api/v3/tickets' \ --header 'apikey: 0865evv883j6auflvlt7zrwgqn32qo74'
s3.title: API key

s4.quote: API key is an identity of your LiveAgent (like your username and password) which you can use to build your own custom integration solutions.
s4.title: REST API

s5.quote: Start with a 30-day free trial. No credit card required. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime.
s5.title: Pricing | LiveAgent

s6.quote: API keys: Use third-party applications to retrieve/push data and manage tickets. Small: 1, Medium: 5, Large: 10, Enterprise: 100
s6.title: Pricing | LiveAgent - API keys limits

s7.quote: We encourage creating trial accounts under the company email addresses. ... Create account for FREE
s7.title: Start your free trial today | LiveAgent

s8.quote: While logged in as an admin navigate to Configuration> System> API which loads the API v3 section where you find existing API keys or add a new one.
s8.title: API key - how to get my API key

s9.quote: Complete API reference ... Agents, Application, Companies, Conversations, Customers, Files, Knowledgebase, Online status, Reports, Tags, Tickets...
s9.title: Complete API reference

s10.quote: If you need to generate LiveAgent's API library / SDK for your preferred programming language you can use the swagger (OpenAPI) API descriptor
s10.title: API v3

s11.quote: The API rate limit is set right now to 180 requests per minute, counted for each API key separately.
s11.title: LiveAgent API - rate limit

s12.quote: Where can I find the API v3 documentation? You can find whole LiveAgent API documentation within your LiveAgent account: https://YOURDOMAIN.ladesk.com/docs/api/v3/#/
s12.title: API v3 documentation location

s13.quote: LiveAgent's built-in MCP (Model Context Protocol) server allows for easy connection with external AI tools such as Claude Desktop, Cursor, claude.ai, FlowHunt, and others.
s13.title: LiveAgent monthly product update: May edition - MCP integration

s14.quote: This page contains complete API documentation for LiveAgent software. ... This Python package is automatically generated by the Swagger Codegen project
s14.title: QualityUnit/LiveAgent-api-python

limitations: Could not find a specific MCP endpoint URL for LiveAgent's built-in MCP server; the documentation mentions it exists but does not provide a public endpoint URL.
Could not verify if the API v1 and v3 Swagger descriptor are publicly accessible without a LiveAgent account; the docs reference an account-specific URL.
No Composio toolkit found specifically for LiveAgent.
